prompt: Add GSAP animations to this portfolio site. It's a minimal designer portfolio — should feel subtle and premium, not flashy. Make it scroll-responsive with kinetic typography on the hero heading.

assertions.text: Output file is a duplicate (not the original) — original 02-portfolio-minimal.html is untouched
GSAP core + ScrollTrigger CDN scripts are included via <script> tags
SplitText plugin is loaded from cdn.jsdelivr.net and registered
Hero has a GSAP timeline with 4+ chained .fromTo or .from calls
gsap.matchMedia wraps animation code with prefers-reduced-motion guard
autoAlpha is used instead of bare opacity in gsap.from/fromTo calls
ScrollTrigger scroll reveals cover projects, about, and contact sections
At least one interactive effect exists (magnetic, spring hover, or tilt)
No CSS transition conflicts with GSAP-owned properties
Token comments are present (e.g. // token: base, // token: entrance)
gsap.registerPlugin() is called for all used plugins
ScrollTrigger.refresh() is called on window load event
